THE STRONGEST DAMAGE OCCURRED TO MULTIPLE FARMSTEADS NEAR THE COMMUNITY OF ARMSTRONG...WHERE TWO HOUSES WERE COMPLETELY DESTROYED AND A VEHICLE WAS TOSSED 3000 FT.
